title: Integrate IRS 990 / ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer (US foundations)
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). US foundations from IRS Form 990 / ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer are integrated only after the specific access-channel terms are verified and approved. Binding cancer guardrails: open-access / aggregate / organization-/award-level data ONLY -- no controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA), no individual-level biobank/clinical data, no identifiable patient data; proprietary research-intelligence databases (Dimensions/WoS/Scopus/Candid) are out of scope; no medical advice or clinical interpretation. See PLAN.md.
objective: Integrate US-foundation records from IRS 990 / ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer after verifying access-channel terms, storing only public organization/grant-level fields with full provenance.
acceptanceCriteria: IRS Form 990 / ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer US-foundation records integrated only after the access channel's terms are verified and recorded approved in the allow-list.
Only organization/grant-level public-filing fields stored; no patient/individual data; 100% provenance + retrievedAt.
Attribution/terms recorded; the CI gate quartet passes.
output: data/irs990/ US-foundation records, committed via PR.
